omitted_declarations.policy_reference: This refers to the data that you voluntarily provide to us, which identifies you personally. This includes, but is not limited to, your name and email address; it may also include other personal and preference information you provide to us.

This refers to the data that you voluntarily provide to us, which identifies you personally. This includes, but is not limited to, your name and email address; it may also include other personal and preference information you provide to us.

We may use third-party companies and individuals to facilitate our service (e.g., maintenance services, database management, web analytics, and payment processing), or to assist us in analyzing how our service is used. These third parties may have access to your Personal Information but only to perform these tasks on our behalf.

We may receive information about you from third-party analytics providers, such as Amplitude, Firebase, Appsflyer, Facebook SDK, and Apphud. This information may include usage details, geographic location, and demographic information.
